message:
refactor(codegen): Complete emitUniqueBlockStart deprecation

- Fixed missed discard block in collections_mod.zig (genUserList)
- Migrated discard() helper in mod_helper.zig to use nextNameId()
- Removed deprecated emitUniqueBlockStart/emitBlockBreak functions

These functions are now completely removed from the codebase.
All 308 *_mod.zig files + mod_helper.zig itself now use nextNameId().

Verified with successful build - no regressions.
